/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/Grid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/InputHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/Panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/erode.dir/src/velocity/Velocity.cpp.o -o erode  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
